items.prompt: Which GDPR theme is emphasized in this clip?
choices: Lawful basis, minimization, and data-subject rights
Mandatory federated learning for all models
items.explain: GDPR combines rights catalogs with accountability and documented controls.

choices: Protected health information held by covered entities and business associates in the US
items.explain: HIPAA concentrates on PHI/ePHI with Privacy, Security, and Breach Notification Rules.

items.prompt: This chapter treats statute summaries as a substitute for legal counsel.
items.explain: The text explicitly says details change and teams should use sections as planning maps, not compliance manuals.

choices: GDPR administrative fine ceilings for serious infringements
How to compute differential privacy epsilon
items.explain: Fines can reach €20M or 4% of worldwide turnover, whichever is higher.
